purpose: Verify that source-analysis.json is actually represented in interaction-model.json before renderer payload generation.

rules.sourceCoverageRequired: interaction-model.json must include sourceCoverage[] entries that map source-analysis item ids to model ids.
rules.allSourceItemsCovered: Every source-analysis item must be mapped before rendering.
rules.refsMustExist: Every mappedTo id must exist in modules, interfaces, flow ids, flow node ids, wireframe element ids, or overview.
rules.interfaceCoverage: Every interface candidate maps to at least one IF-* id.
rules.flowCoverage: Every flow candidate maps to at least one FLOW-* or NODE-* id.
rules.riskCoverage: Risks and AI pending questions map to concrete interface or element ids.
rules.overviewIsDesignProblem: 1.0 overview must describe design/player interaction problems, not only summarize gameplay mechanics.
